parsedJson.summary: The site has a real roofing image and clear service promise, but the first screen makes it harder than necessary for a Brisbane customer to call, verify trust, or request help quickly.

issues.title: Mobile call action is not visible
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the visible first screen ends with only the top edge of a white rounded element at the bottom; there is no readable phone number, 'Call Now' button, or quote button visible above the fold.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching customer with a leaking roof is usually trying to contact someone fast. If they have to scroll or open the menu before they can call, many will go back and choose another roofer with a visible phone button.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile first screen should show a sticky bottom phone button or a clear 'Call Now' button directly under the headline, with the phone number readable and tappable without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move a high-contrast 'Call Now' CTA and phone number into the mobile hero, and add a sticky bottom bar with 'Call' and 'Get Quote' actions.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏看不到可以直接打电话的按钮，客户还要往下滑或点菜单才知道怎么联系你。
issues.customer_impact: 本地找屋顶维修的人多数是在手机上快速比较商家，常见行为是在几秒内决定要不要打电话；如果首屏不能马上联系，很多客户会直接回到 Google 地图选下一家。

issues.title: Header hides the phone number
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the top navigation only shows HOME, SERVICES, and CONTACT; there is no phone number or emergency call action in the header.
issues.why_problem: A local customer checking roofers on a laptop still expects the phone number to be obvious. Making them hunt through a contact page adds effort at the exact moment they may be ready to call.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Desktop header should include a visible phone number on the right, such as 'Call 07 xxxx xxxx', plus a distinct quote button beside it.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the plain 'CONTACT' nav item area with a visible phone number button and a secondary 'Request Quote' button, keeping navigation links smaller.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑端顶部只有菜单，没有电话号码；客户想联系时需要自己去找。
issues.customer_impact: 客户越接近打电话，页面越不能增加步骤。少一个明显电话号码，就可能少一次询价，尤其是从 Google 商家资料点进来的高意向客户。

issues.title: White text blends into roof photo
issues.what_observed: The large white 'HYTEK ROOFING' headline, white service line, and small white paragraph sit over a pale grey metal roof and washed-out sky.
issues.why_problem: The page looks airy, but parts of the message are harder to read quickly. A visitor scanning on a bright phone screen may miss the service details and trust claims.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Hero text should sit on a darker overlay area or a solid color panel, with 16px+ readable body text and strong contrast between text and background.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a controlled dark overlay behind the hero copy, or place the copy in a left-aligned section over the darker part of the image while preserving the roof photo.
issues.plain_explanation: 白色文字放在浅色屋顶和天空上，有些内容不够醒目，看起来费眼。
issues.customer_impact: 访客通常只扫一眼首屏，如果看不清你做什么、服务哪里、有没有保障，就更容易离开；首屏信息不清会直接减少电话和报价请求。

issues.title: Two CTAs compete without priority
issues.what_observed: On desktop, 'CALL NOW' is a large white pill button on the left, while 'GET A QUOTE' is a white outlined pill button on the right; neither includes a phone number.
issues.why_problem: The visitor has to decide between two similar-looking actions without knowing which is faster or more useful. For urgent roofing problems, the primary action should be unmistakable.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One primary CTA should dominate, such as a filled high-contrast 'Call 07 xxxx xxxx' button, with 'Get a Quote' as a quieter secondary action.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make 'Call Now' the primary colored button with the phone number included, and restyle 'Get a Quote' as a secondary text or outline button nearby.
issues.plain_explanation: 两个按钮看起来差不多，而且没有电话号码，客户不清楚应该先点哪个。
issues.customer_impact: 选择越多、越不清楚，客户越容易犹豫。屋顶维修这种急事，按钮应该让客户一秒知道怎么联系，否则询价机会会流失。

issues.title: Trust claims lack proof
issues.what_observed: The hero paragraph says '80+ combined 5-star reviews across Google & Hipages', and the lower hero lists '48 hour Quote Turnaround', 'Fully Licensed & Insured', and 'Workmanship Guarantee', but there are no visible review stars, licence number, badges, or customer proof in the screenshot.
issues.why_problem: The claims are useful, but visitors are skeptical when proof is only written as text. A homeowner comparing roofers wants quick evidence that the business is real and well reviewed.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Trust area should show visible star rating, review count, Google/Hipages labels, licence/insurance detail, and a short real testimonial or project proof near the CTA.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a compact trust strip under the hero CTA with Google stars, '80+ reviews', licence/insurance note, and a link or visual cue to verified reviews.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面写了很多可信承诺，但没有把星级评价、执照信息或真实客户证明展示出来。
issues.customer_impact: 客户在 Google 上会同时比较好几家 roofer，看到可验证的评价和资质更容易放心打电话；只写一句话，信任感会弱很多。

issues.title: Mobile header prioritises menu over calling
issues.what_observed: The mobile header shows the Hytek logo on the left and a small hamburger icon on the right, with no visible phone icon or quote action.
issues.why_problem: A menu icon is less useful than a phone button for a local service visitor. Customers with roof leaks or gutter issues are looking for help, not browsing a complex site.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header should show logo, phone icon/button, and optionally a smaller menu icon, with the call action visually stronger than navigation.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the right-side hamburger-only header with a phone icon button and keep the menu accessible as a secondary icon or inside a sticky action bar.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机顶部最显眼的是菜单，不是电话；对找维修的人来说顺序反了。
issues.customer_impact: 本地服务客户通常是带着问题来的，不是慢慢逛网站。把电话藏起来会让急单客户更快跳去能马上拨打的竞争对手。

issues.title: Mobile hero wastes vertical space
issues.what_observed: On mobile, there is a large blank sky area between the logo/header and the 'HYTEK ROOFING' headline.
issues.why_problem: The empty space pushes useful details and contact actions lower on the page. On a small screen, every visible inch should help the customer understand and act.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile hero should tighten the top spacing so the service promise, trust proof, and call action all appear in the first screen.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Crop or reposition the hero image on mobile, reduce the top blank sky area, and bring the headline, trust strip, and CTA higher.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机首屏上方留了太多空白，真正有用的信息被挤到下面。
issues.customer_impact: 手机屏幕空间很宝贵；如果客户第一眼看到的是空白而不是联系方式和服务优势，就更容易失去耐心。

positive_observations: The hero uses a real roofing-related photo instead of a generic stock graphic.
The headline clearly names the business, and the service line mentions roof repairs, guttering, and leak fixes.
The page already includes useful trust messages such as reviews, licensing, insurance, quote turnaround, and workmanship guarantee.
redesign_priorities: 1. Put a tappable phone number and primary call button above the fold on mobile and desktop.
2. Rebuild the hero with stronger text contrast, tighter mobile spacing, and one clear primary action.
3. Turn the written trust claims into visible proof with stars, review count, licence/insurance detail, and guarantee badge.
